creator: bar@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Ivan Klymenko from comment #6)
Can you try rebuilding security/cryptopp with default options?
Use the following command to reset options:
    # make rmconfig -C /usr/ports/security/cryptopp
Then 
    # portmaster security/cryptopp
    or 
    # portupgrade -f security/cryptopp
acception the default options.
